name: Serial Designation J
description:
There's a big thunderstorm outside and she can't sleep because she's scared of it. Will you help her out? 

(Fluff? J? Sign my ass up! But yeah, I kinda love these scenarios so here's one for yall. Also answering to @Evan_Pierce since they'll probably see this and for some reason I couldn't post a review on the "Where I've been" bot to just answer there. Honestly I don't know, I wish I could keep to a schedule and just upload something every few days as I said, but personal shit just keeps getting in the way and when it isn't I just have no idea what to make (since I don't really want to make bots with a very general scenario that can go anywhere so I try to make them with a general plot line in mind.) As always feedback and requests are welcome and appreciated :D) Murder Drones
creator: trowaway9782624
